_note: Does the high-confidence tier beat the market on the SAME fixtures? Run: python -m scripts.tier_benchmark. DECISIVE NEGATIVE RESULT -- at every threshold the model's pick is IDENTICAL to the de-vigged market's pick 100% of the time. The 77% hit rate on the p>=0.65 tier is therefore pure selection (strong favourites win often), not model skill. Do not re-run expecting a different answer, and do not bill this tier as an edge over the market.
